nodes.speaker: Murial
nodes.text: Dang it! These collapsed veins are completely blocking the pathway.

nodes.speaker: Kael
nodes.text: Is there any way to clear them?

nodes.speaker: Murial
nodes.text: I can lift them out of the way, but you need to summon my energy first. Press [3] to swap to me, then hold [E] to clear the roots!

nodes.speaker: Objective
nodes.text: Press [3] to switch to Murial, then hold [E] to lift the collapsed veins.
